data: Member, Board of Governors, Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System

this is a sole-member passthrough LLC I use for any writing or consulting income I receive (reported below). Much of the income from other non-W2 sources is double counted here (Manhattan Instittue, Balyasny)
Hudson Bay Capital Management LP (Asset management)
HBC Anticipated Bonus (from service year 2024, paid in frst quarter of 2025)
* Note: This bonus was received subsequent to filing.
SM Consulting 1 LLC (sole-member passthrough LLC for my writing/consulting)
Writing and consulting income.  This is double counted with Manhattan Institute and Balyasny - since that income was received via this passthrough LLC
PIMCO Low Duration Income Fund Class A Shares (PFIAX)
* Note - this bonus was received subsequent to filing.

I expect to receive a year-end performance bonus for calendar year 2024.  It is standard for asset managers to defer bonus payments until the quarter following the end of the service year, as they wait for audits and other business items to proceed. (2024-02-01)

I will continue to participate in the defined contribution 401(k) plan.  The plan sponsor will not make future contributions after my separation, or I will roll over my 401(k) after separation from HBC. (2024-02-01)
My single-member passthrough entity will be inactive during my appointment. (2023-01-01)
Services as Senior strategist: economic analysis, market analysis, thought leadership
Services as sole member - this is double counting the income from Manhattan Institute, which passes through SM Consulting 1 LLC
Provided analysis of the economy and financial markets, thought leadership
